'''Smarteel''' was a desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

==History==
Smarteel had its share of outlaws who called this planet their home and who dealt in illegal trade.

It was home to the base of [[Cabrool Nuum]], an old associate of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Smarteel in the [[Kanchen sector/Legends|Kanchen sector]], which is actually located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].
